assumptions: The smoke scope verifies presence and identity, not deep interaction flows
Offer categories are treated as separate visible requirements
open_questions: Which offer categories are business-critical and should later be upgraded from visibility checks to click/navigation checks?
Should the contact and newsletter areas later include validation behavior, or remain presence-only?

requirements.title: Erbjudanden page identity is visible
requirements.requirement: A desktop user shall be able to open the Erbjudanden page and confirm that the correct destination has loaded.
requirements.observable_outcome: The URL contains '/erbjudanden/' and the heading 'Våra erbjudanden' is visible.
acceptance_criteria: Given the user opens the Erbjudanden page on desktop, when the page finishes loading, then the URL contains '/erbjudanden/'
Given the page has loaded, then the visible heading 'Våra erbjudanden' is present
candidate_test_cases: Verify the heading 'Våra erbjudanden' is visible

requirements.title: Primary contact CTA is visible
requirements.requirement: A desktop user shall be able to see the primary contact call to action on the Erbjudanden page.
requirements.observable_outcome: The CTA 'Jag vill bli kontaktad' is visible.
acceptance_criteria: Given the Erbjudanden page has loaded, then the CTA 'Jag vill bli kontaktad' is visible
candidate_test_cases: Verify 'Jag vill bli kontaktad' is visible

requirements.title: Offer category Customer Experience is visible
requirements.requirement: A desktop user shall be able to see the Customer Experience offer category on the Erbjudanden page.
acceptance_criteria: Given the Erbjudanden page has loaded, then 'Customer Experience' is visible

requirements.title: Offer category Data & Analytics is visible
requirements.requirement: A desktop user shall be able to see the Data & Analytics offer category on the Erbjudanden page.
acceptance_criteria: Given the Erbjudanden page has loaded, then 'Data & Analytics' is visible

requirements.title: Offer category ERP & Affärssystem is visible
requirements.requirement: A desktop user shall be able to see the ERP & Affärssystem offer category on the Erbjudanden page.
acceptance_criteria: Given the Erbjudanden page has loaded, then 'ERP & Affärssystem' is visible

requirements.title: Offer category Business Transformation is visible
requirements.requirement: A desktop user shall be able to see the Business Transformation offer category on the Erbjudanden page.
acceptance_criteria: Given the Erbjudanden page has loaded, then 'Business Transformation' is visible

requirements.title: Offer category Kvalitetssäkring is visible
requirements.requirement: A desktop user shall be able to see the Kvalitetssäkring offer category on the Erbjudanden page.
acceptance_criteria: Given the Erbjudanden page has loaded, then 'Kvalitetssäkring' is visible

requirements.title: Offer category UX & Design is visible
requirements.requirement: A desktop user shall be able to see the UX & Design offer category on the Erbjudanden page.
acceptance_criteria: Given the Erbjudanden page has loaded, then 'UX & Design' is visible

requirements.title: Offer category Utveckling is visible
requirements.requirement: A desktop user shall be able to see the Utveckling offer category on the Erbjudanden page.
acceptance_criteria: Given the Erbjudanden page has loaded, then 'Utveckling' is visible

requirements.title: Offer category Webb & E-handel is visible
requirements.requirement: A desktop user shall be able to see the Webb & E-handel offer category on the Erbjudanden page.
acceptance_criteria: Given the Erbjudanden page has loaded, then 'Webb & E-handel' is visible

requirements.title: Offer category AI is visible
requirements.requirement: A desktop user shall be able to see the AI offer category on the Erbjudanden page.
acceptance_criteria: Given the Erbjudanden page has loaded, then 'AI' is visible

requirements.title: Contact area is visible
requirements.requirement: A desktop user shall be able to see a contact area on the Erbjudanden page.
requirements.observable_outcome: A contact section and visible form fields are present.
acceptance_criteria: Given the Erbjudanden page has loaded, then a contact section is visible
Given the contact section is visible, then visible form fields are present
candidate_test_cases: Verify the contact area is visible
Verify at least one visible form field is present

requirements.title: Newsletter area is visible
requirements.requirement: A desktop user shall be able to see the newsletter signup area on the Erbjudanden page.
requirements.observable_outcome: The newsletter section and an email input or signup control are visible.
acceptance_criteria: Given the Erbjudanden page has loaded, then the newsletter section is visible
Given the newsletter section is visible, then an email input or signup control is visible
candidate_test_cases: Verify the newsletter area is visible
Verify an email input or signup button is visible
